title: Recursive Containers, Stack Parsing, Depth, and Recovery · Runtime Lens: Recursion Contract
summary: Deeply nested lists overflow recursion, an unmatched container consumes the rest of the file, child offsets drift, and one invalid construct prevents later valid content from rendering. Predict the reader decision, source identity, parse state, output URL, accessibility result, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the recursion contract increment in bounded nested-block parser and recovery trace. Learners progress through prediction, explic…
objectives: Define base case, recursive reduction, returned state, source advancement, and invariant for nested document structures.
Match opening and closing fence character and length, retain info text and literal content, and define end-of-file behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: ssg-recursion-contract — Define base case, recursive reduction, returned state, source advancement, and invariant for nested document structures.
# Evidence: ssg-worked-static-site-nesting-recursion-2
# Competency: ssg-worked-static-site-nesting-recursion-2.
# Case 7417: a project-subpath GitHub Pages deployment.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, reader task, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence.
def worked_static_site_nesting_recursion_2(containers_opened: int = 7, containers_closed: int = 7, max_depth: int = 6, recovery_points: int = 2, stalled_positions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "readerworked2",
        "source7417",
        "parse2dekrow",
        "routeworked27417",
        "artifact7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if containers_opened < 0 or containers_closed < 0:
        return False, containers_closed, "container-count"
    if containers_closed != containers_opened:
        return False, containers_closed, "container-balance"
    if max_depth < 0 or max_depth > 64:
        return False, max_depth, "depth-budget"
    if recovery_points < 1 or stalled_positions > 0:
        return False, stalled_positions, "recovery-progress"
    assert containers_closed == containers_opened
    return True, max_depth, "recoverable-nesting"

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-recursion-contract-rsxtoo
# Competency: ssg-recursion-contract.
# Case 7652: a large technical reference incremental rebuild.
# Operating constraint: retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity.
# Changed case: rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence.
def evidence_ssg_recursion_contract_rsxtoo(containers_opened: int = 7, containers_closed: int = 7, max_depth: int = 6, recovery_points: int = 2, stalled_positions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_rsxtoo = "rsxtoo-ootxsr-7652"
    assert evidence_variant_rsxtoo
    evidence_axes_rsxtoo = (
        "readerrsxtoo",
        "source7652",
        "parseootxsr",
        "routersxtoo7652",
        "artifact7652rsxtoo",
        "recoveryootxsr7652",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_rsxtoo)) == 6
    if containers_opened < 0 or containers_closed < 0:
        return False, containers_closed, "container-count"
    if containers_closed != containers_opened:
        return False, containers_closed, "container-balance"
    if max_depth < 0 or max_depth > 64:
        return False, max_depth, "depth-budget"
    if recovery_points < 1 or stalled_positions > 0:
        return False, stalled_positions, "recovery-progress"
    assert containers_closed == containers_opened
    return True, max_depth, "recoverable-nesting"
